answers: what programs is a container executing
probes.use_when: you need to audit what binaries are being executed in a container. critical for security observability — an AI agent container should not be running unexpected binaries.
probes.not_when: you need process resource usage — use cgroup metrics.

interpretations.pattern: unexpected binary execution in a container
interpretations.conclusion: a process is executing a binary that was not part of the container image
interpretations.action: investigate the source of the binary. may indicate compromise or misconfiguration.

answers: what exit code did a process return

fields.name: exit_code
fields.meaning: exit code — 0 normal, signal-based if killed

probes.use_when: you want to observe process termination. exit codes above 128 indicate the process was killed by a signal (exit_code - 128 = signal number).
probes.not_when: you need to know why the process exited — correlate with other probes or application logs.

interpretations.conclusion: process was killed by SIGKILL — likely OOM killed or manually terminated
interpretations.action: correlate with oom_kill_process. if OOM kill, increase memory limits.

interpretations.pattern: exit_code != 0 and repeated for same command
interpretations.action: check application logs. correlate with container restart events in TAPIO.

probes.use_when: you need to track process or thread creation. ret < 0 means fork failed — system may be out of PIDs or memory.
probes.not_when: you need to know what the child process does — use do_execve for that.

interpretations.conclusion: fork/clone failed — system cannot create new processes. may be out of PIDs, memory, or hitting cgroup pids limit
interpretations.action: check cgroup pids limit, system PID max, and memory. EAGAIN = resource limit, ENOMEM = no memory.

interpretations.pattern: high clone rate from one process
interpretations.conclusion: process is forking rapidly — possible fork bomb or poorly designed spawning
interpretations.action: investigate the process. set cgroup pids limit to prevent fork bombs.
